name: MSSP - OS - MS - 18 - H - Login Attempts from Disabled Account
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4625
when the event matches Sub Status (custom) is any of 0xc0000072
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 18 - H - Login Attempts from Disabled Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4625
AND when the event matches Sub Status (custom) is any of 0xc0000072
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Login Attempts from Disabled Account
